website/sidebars.js.comment: Fix duplicate sidebar translation key: sidebars.js has two 'Relay Resolvers' categories (one in Client Side Data under Feature Guides, one in API Reference). Convert the API Reference one to long-form with a unique key to avoid translation key collision.
